quote: Anything in life worth having is worth working for.
author: Andrew Carnegie

quote: Success often comes to those who dare to act. It seldom goes to the timid who are ever afraid of the consequences.
author: Jawaharlal Nehru

quote: Success is never ending, failure is never final.
author: Dr. Robert Schuller

quote: I just love when people say I can’t do something because all my life people said I wasn’t going to make it.
author: Ted Turner

quote: Great thoughts speak only to the thoughtful mind, but great actions speak to all mankind.
author: Emily P. Bissell

quote: Obstacles are those frightful things you can see when you take your eyes off your goal.
author: Henry Ford

quote: It takes a strong fish to swim against the current. Even a dead one can float with it.
author: John Crowe

quote: You will never find time for anything. You must make it.
author: Charles Buxton

quote: Remove failure as an option.
author: Joan Lunden

quote: There is no one giant step that does it. It's a lot of little steps.
author: Peter A. Cohen

quote: Shoot for the moon. Even if you miss, you will land among the stars.
author: Les Brown

quote: Some of us have great runways already built for us. If you have one, take off. But if you don't have one, realize it is your responsibility to grab a shovel and build one for yourself and for those who will follow after you.
author: Amelia Earhart

quote: Work like you don't need the money. Love like you've never been hurt. Dance like nobody is watching.
author: Mark Twain

quote: What the mind of man can conceive and believe, it can achieve.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: There are no secrets to success. It is the result of preparation, hard work, and learning from failure.
author: Colin Powell

quote: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Great works are performed not by strength but by perseverance.
author: Samuel Johnson

quote: The difference between a successful person and others is not a lack of strength, not a lack of knowledge, but rather a lack of will.
author: Vince Lombardi

quote: The man who follows the crowd will usually get no further than the crowd. The man who walks alone is likely to find himself in places no one has ever been.
author: Alan Ashley-Pitt

quote: It takes 20 years to build a reputation and five minutes to ruin it. If you think about that, you'll do things differently.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Champions aren't made in the gyms. Champions are made from something they have deep inside them - a desire, a dream, a vision.
author: Muhammad Ali

quote: Dwell not on the past. Use it to illustrate a point, then leave it behind. Nothing really matters except what you do now in this instant of time. From this moment onwards you can be an entirely different person, filled with love and understanding, ready with an outstretched hand, uplifted and positive in every thought and deed.
author: Eileen Caddy

quote: The critical ingredient is getting off your butt and doing something. It's as simple as that. A lot of people have ideas, but there are few who decide to do something about them now. Not tomorrow. Not next week. But today. The true entrepreneur is a doer.
author: Nolan Bushnell

quote: Whatever you vividly imagine, ardently desire, sincerely believe, and enthusiastically act upon must inevitably come to pass!
author: Paul J. Meyer

quote: Keep away from small people who try to belittle your ambitions. Small people always do that, but the really great make you feel that you too can become great.
author: Mark Twain

quote: For anything worth having one must pay the price; and the price is always work, patience, love, self-sacrifice. No paper currency, no promises to pay, but the gold of real service.
author: John Burroughs

quote: To be successful, you must decide exactly what you want to accomplish, then resolve to pay the price to get it.
author: Bunker Hunt

quote: You just can't beat the person who never gives up.
author: Babe Ruth

quote: When you get right down to the root of the meaning of the word 'succeed', you find it simply means to follow through.
author: F.W. Nichol

quote: Successful people are always looking for opportunities to help others. Unsuccessful people are always asking, 'What's in it for me?'
author: Brian Tracy

quote: If you don't set goals, you can't regret not reaching them.
author: Yogi Berra

quote: Success is achieved by those who try and keep trying with a positive mental attitude.
author: W. Clement Stone

quote: I couldn't wait for success, so I went ahead without it.
author: Jonathan Winters

quote: What we hope to do with ease, we must learn first to do with diligence.
author: Samuel Johnson

quote: We do our best that we know how at the moment, and if it doesn't turn out, we modify it.
author: Franklin Delano Roosevelt

quote: A Native American grandfather was talking to his grandson about how he felt. He said, 'I feel as if I have two wolves fighting in my heart. One wolf is the vengeful, violent one, the other wolf is the loving compassionate one.' The grandson asked him, 'Which wolf will win the fight in your heart?' The grandfather answered, 'The one I feed.'" +2
author: Blackhawk

quote: Enthusiasm is the steam that drives the engine.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: The winners in life think constantly in terms of I can, I will, and I am. Losers, on the other hand, concentrate their waking thoughts on what they should have or would have done, or what they can't do.
author: Dennis Waitley

quote: Success in life has nothing to do with what you gain in life or accomplish for yourself. It's what you do for others.
author: Danny Thomas

quote: Empty pockets never held anyone back. Only empty heads and empty hearts can do that.
author: Norman Vincent Peale

quote: One man with courage is a majority.
author: Andrew Jackson

quote: Not many people are willing to give failure a second opportunity. They fail once and it is all over. The bitter pill of failure is often more than most people can handle. If you are willing to accept failure and learn from it, if you are willing to consider failure as a blessing in disguise and bounce back, you have got the essential of harnessing one of the most powerful success forces.
author: Joseph Sugarman

quote: Every achiever I have ever met says, 'My life turned around when I began to believe in me.'
author: Robert Schuller

quote: I don't measure a man's success by how high he climbs but how high he bounces when he hits bottom.
author: George Patton

quote: One step - choosing a goal and sticking to it - changes everything.
author: Scott Reed

quote: Dependent people need others to get what they want. Independent people can get what they want through their own efforts. Interdependent people combine their own efforts with the efforts of others to achieve their greatest success.
author: Stephen Covey

quote: I don't know what your destiny will be, but one thing I do know: The only ones among you who will be really happy are those who have sought and found how to serve.
author: Albert Schweitzer

quote: Success is the child of audacity.
author: Benjamin Disraeli

quote: Teamwork is the long word for success.
author: Jacquelinemae A. Rudd

quote: Except and expect positive things and that is what you will receive.
author: Lori Hard

quote: You measure the size of the accomplishment by the obstacles you had to overcome to reach your goals.
author: Booker T. Washington

quote: In order to succeed you must fail so that you know what not to do the next time.
author: Anthony J. D'Angelo

quote: Those at the top of the mountain didn't fall there.
author: Marcus Washling

quote: Motivation is what gets you started. Habit is what keeps you going!
author: Jim Ryun

quote: I am enough of an artist to draw freely upon my imagination. Imagination is more important than knowledge. Knowledge is limited. Imagination encircles the world.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Only those who risk going too far can possibly find out how far one can go.
author: T.S. Eliot

quote: It's amazing what ordinary people can do if they set out without preconceived notions.
author: Charles F. Kettering

quote: People who are afraid to fail can never experience the joys of success.
author: Pete Zafra

quote: No matter how small, acknowledge the achievement.
author: Greg Henry Quinn

quote: If you don't quit, and don't cheat, and don't run home when trouble arrives, you can only win.
author: Shelley Long

quote: Put your heart, mind, intellect, and soul even to your smallest acts. This is the secret of success.
author: Swami Sivananda

quote: The person who makes a success of living is the one who sees his goal steadily and aims for it unswervingly. That is dedication.
author: Cecil B. DeMille

quote: One only gets to the top rung on the ladder by steadily climbing up one at a time, and suddenly, all sorts of powers, all sorts of abilities which you thought never belonged to you - suddenly become within your own possibility and you think, 'Well, I'll have a go, too.'
author: Margaret Thatcher

quote: It is in the small decisions you and I make every day that create our destiny.
author: Anthony Robbins

quote: Deliver more than you are getting paid to do. The victory of success will be half won when you learn the secret of putting out more than is expected in all that you do. Make yourself so valuable in your work that eventually you will become indispensable. Exercise your privilege to go the extra mile, and enjoy all the rewards you receive.
author: Og Mandino

quote: Life is not easy for any of us, but what of that? We must have perseverance and above all confidence in ourselves.
author: Marie Curie

quote: There are two primary choices in life: to accept conditions as they exist, or accept the responsibility for changing them.
author: Denis Waitley

quote: Effective people are not problem-minded; they're opportunity-minded. They feed opportunities and starve problems.
author: Stephen Covey

quote: A professional is a person who can do his best at a time when he doesn't particularly feel like it.
author: Alistair Cooke

quote: Whatever your grade or position, if you know how and when to speak, and when to remain silent, your chances of real success are proportionately increased.
author: Ralph C. Smedley

quote: I do not think there is any other quality so essential to success of any kind as the quality of perseverance. It overcomes almost everything, even nature.
author: John D. Rockefeller

quote: I know the price of success: dedication, hard work and an unremitting devotion to the things you want to see happen.
author: Frank Lloyd Wright

quote: Do not fear to be eccentric in opinion, for every opinion now accepted was once eccentric.
author: Bertrand Russell

quote: Each problem has hidden in it an opportunity so powerful that it literally dwarfs the problem. The greatest success stories were created by people who recognized a problem and turned it into an opportunity.
author: Joseph Sugarman

quote: Fortunate is the person who has developed the self-control to steer a straight course towards his objective in life, without being swayed from his purpose by either commendation or condemnation.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: Never let your work drive you. Master it and keep it in complete control.
author: Booker T. Washington

quote: Follow your dream as long as you live, do not lessen the time of following desire, for wasting time is an abomination of the spirit.
author: Plato

quote: You say I started out with practically nothing, but that isn't correct. We all start with all there is. It's how we use it that makes things possible.
author: Henry Ford

quote: I don't have to be what nobody else wants me to be and I am not afraid to be what I want to be.
author: Muhammad Ali

quote: The highest reward for one's toil is not what one gets for it, but what one becomes by it.
author: John Ruskin

quote: I studied the lives of great men and women, and I found that the men and women who got to the top were those who did the jobs they had in hand, with everything they had of energy and enthusiasm and hard work.
author: Harry S. Truman

quote: The seat of freedom is reserved for the man who lives by his own work, and in that work, does what he wants to do.
author: George Robin Collingwood

quote: Success is measured in terms of reaching your goals, dreams, and expectations. Your success is determined by hard work, persistence, and determination. If you are going to be a success in life, it is up to you... it is your responsibility.
author: Will Horton

quote: The difference between success and mediocrity is all in the way you think.
author: Dean Francis

quote: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
author: Les Brown

quote: What separates those who achieve from those who do not is in direct proportion to one's ability to ask for help.
author: Donald Keough

quote: You only have to do a very few things right in your life so long as you don't do too many things wrong.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: It is wise to keep in mind that neither success nor failure is ever final.
author: Roger Babson

quote: Success is a journey, not a destination.
author: Ben Sweetland

quote: To guarantee success, act as if it were impossible to fail.
author: Dorothea Brande

quote: Success is often the result of taking a misstep in the right direction.
author: Al Bernstein

quote: You can do it if you believe you can.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: Success is simply a matter of luck. Ask any failure.
author: Earl Wilson

quote: I like a state of continual becoming, with a goal in front and not behind.
author: George Bernard Shaw

quote: You must do the very thing you think you cannot do.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Flaming enthusiasm, backed by horse-sense and persistence, is the quality that most frequently makes for success.
author: Dale Carnegie

quote: It's the repetition of affirmations that leads to belief. And once that belief becomes a deep conviction, things begin to happen.
author: Claude M. Bristol

quote: The biggest temptation is to settle for too little.
author: Thomas Merton

quote: Yes, I am a dreamer. For a dreamer is one who can find his way by moonlight, and see the dawn before the rest of the world.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: Don't dream it. Be it!
author: Richard O'brian

quote: He has achieved success who has lived well, laughed often and loved much.
author: Bessie Anderson Stanley

quote: If you don't go after what you want, you'll never have it. If you don't ask, the answer is always no. If you don't step forward, you're always in the same place.
author: Nora Roberts

quote: Henry Ford could get anything out of men because he just talked and would tell them stories. He'd never say, 'I want this done!' He'd say, 'I wonder if we can do it.'" +1
author: George Brown

quote: Those who dream by day are cognizant of many things which escape those who dream only by night.
author: Edgar Allen Poe

quote: The key to happiness is having dreams; the key to success is making them come true.
author: James Allen

quote: Life is a series of problem-solving opportunities. The problems you face will either defeat you or develop you depending on how you respond to them.
author: Rick Warren

quote: All men who have achieved great things have been great dreamers.
author: Orison Swett Marden

quote: Success is doing ordinary things extraordinarily well.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: I start with the premise that the function of leadership is to produce more leaders, not more followers.
author: Ralph Nader

quote: Never walk away from failure. On the contrary, study it carefully and imaginatively for its hidden assets.
author: Michael Korda

quote: Nothing ever comes to one that is worth having except as a result of hard work.
author: Booker T. Washington

quote: You cannot control what happens to you, but you can control your attitude toward what happens to you, and in that, you will be mastering change rather than allowing it to master you.
author: Brian Tracy

quote: I learned that the only way you are going to get anywhere in life is to work hard at it. Whether you're a musician, a writer, an athlete or a businessman, there is no getting around it. If you do, you'll win - if you don't you won't.
author: Bruce Jenner

quote: Unless you are willing to drench yourself in your work beyond the capacity of the average man, you are just not cut out for positions at the top.
author: J.C. Penny

quote: Success is not measured by what a man accomplishes, but by the opposition he has encountered and the courage with which he has maintained the struggle against overwhelming odds.
author: Charles Lindbergh

quote: If you have the will to win, you have achieved half your success; if you don't, you have achieved half your failure.
author: David Ambrose

quote: You may be disappointed if you fail, but you are doomed if you don't try.
author: Beverly Sills

quote: Unless you try to do something beyond what you have already mastered, you will never grow.
author: Ronald E. Osborn

quote: Your success and happiness lie in you.
author: Helen Keller

quote: Successful and unsuccessful people do not vary greatly in their abilities. They vary in their desires to reach their potential.
author: John Maxwell

quote: The only difference between a success and a failure is that the successful person is willing to do what the failure is not willing to do.
author: J.R. Ridinger

quote: The man who moved a mountain was the one who began carrying away small stones.
author: Chinese Proverb

quote: Winning isn't everything. It's the only thing.
author: Vincent Lombardi

quote: Your imagination is your preview of life's coming attractions.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Whatever you do, you need courage. Whatever course you decide upon, there is always someone to tell you that you are wrong. There are always difficulties arising that tempt you to believe your critics are right. To map out a course of action and follow it to an end requires some of the same courage that a soldier needs. Peace has its victories, but it takes brave men and women to win them.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Successful leaders recognize that great innovation comes from observing the same ideas as everyone else and seeing something different.
author: Reed Markham

quote: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Anthony Robbins

quote: Be humble always and identify with the common man; even when success and achievements want to make you proud.
author: Bishop Leonard Umunna

quote: The successful man will profit from his mistakes and try again in a different way.
author: Dale Carnegie

quote: Believe it can be done. When you believe something can be done, really believe, your mind will find the ways to do it. Believing there is a solution paves the way to a solution.
author: Dr. David Schwartz

quote: All successful men and women are big dreamers. They imagine what their future could be, ideal in every respect, and then they work every day toward their distant vision, that goal or purpose.
author: Brian Tracy

quote: The secret of success is to be ready when your opportunity comes.
author: Benjamin Disraeli

quote: We must never be afraid to go too far, for success lies just beyond.
author: Marcel Proust

quote: No one ever attains very eminent success by simply doing what is required of him; it is the amount and excellence of what is over and above the required that determines the greatness of ultimate distinction.
author: Charles Kendall Adams

quote: I will speak ill of no one and speak all the good I know of everybody.
author: Andrew Jackson

quote: You don't become enormously successful without encountering some really interesting problems.
author: Mark Victor Hansen

quote: I've always tried to go one step past wherever people expected me to end up.
author: Beverly Sills

quote: Few things help an individual more than to place responsibility upon him, and to let him know that you trust him.
author: Booker T. Washington

quote: Don't let the fear of striking out hold you back.
author: Babe Ruth

quote: You have to accept whatever comes and the only important thing is that you meet it with the best you have to give.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: To conquer fear is the beginning of wisdom.
author: Bertrand Russell

quote: Success is every minute you live. It's the process of living. It's stopping for the moments of beauty, of pleasure; the moments of peace. Success is not a destination that you ever reach. Success is the quality of the journey.
author: Jennifer James

quote: I praise loudly; I blame softly.
author: Queen Catherine II

quote: Write down the thoughts of the moment. Those that come unsought for are commonly the most valuable.
author: Francis Bacon

quote: It is literally true that you can succeed best and quickest by helping others to succeed.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: You've got to win in your mind before you win in your life.
author: John Addison

quote: Never be afraid to tread the path alone. Know which is your path and follow is wherever it may lead you; do not feel you have to follow in someone else's footsteps.
author: Eileen Caddy

quote: Success is how high you bounce after you hit bottom.
author: George Patton

quote: The reward of a thing well done is to have done it.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Knowledge without follow-through is worse than no knowledge.
author: Henry Charles Bukowski

quote: Do not despise the bottom rungs in the ascent to greatness.
author: Publilius Syrus

quote: The merit in action lies in finishing it to the end.
author: Genghis Khan

quote: To move the world we must first move ourselves.
author: Socrates

quote: Make a success of living by seeing the goal and aiming for it unswervingly.
author: Cecil B. De Mille

quote: The man who will use his skill and constructive imagination to see how much he can give for a dollar, instead of how little he can give for a dollar, is bound to succeed.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Optimists are right. So are pessimists. It's up to you to choose which you will be.
author: Harvey Mackay

quote: Many hands and hearts and minds generally contribute to anyone's notable achievements.
author: Walt Disney

quote: Winners are the ones who really listen to the truth of their hearts.
author: Sylvester Stallone

quote: When you miss a shot, never think of what you did wrong. Take the next shot thinking of what you must do right.
author: Tony Alfonso

quote: Winners make a habit of manufacturing their own positive expectations in advance of the event.
author: Brian Tracy

quote: A good criterion for measuring success in life is the number of people you have made happy.
author: Robert J. Lumsden

quote: The history of the world is the history of a few people who had faith in themselves.
author: Swami Vivekananda

quote: Ability may take you to the top, but it takes character to stay there.
author: William Blake

quote: Success is the progressive realization of worthwhile, predetermined, personal goals.
author: Paul J. Meyer

quote: Why not go out on a limb? Isn't that where the fruit is?
author: Frank Scully

quote: Success is to be measured not so much by the position that one has reached in life as by the obstacles which he has overcome while trying to succeed.
author: Booker T. Washington

quote: The secret of success is consistency of purpose.
author: Benjamin Disraeli

quote: It's not that I'm so smart; it's just that I stay with problems longer.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence then is not an act but a habit.
author: Aristotle

quote: Sometimes our best is simply not enough. We have to do what is required.
author: Sir Winston Churchill

quote: The path to success is to take massive, determined action.
author: Anthony Robbins

quote: Live out of your imagination, not your history.
author: Stephen Covey

quote: Perpetual optimism is a force multiplier.
author: Colin Powell

quote: Forget yourself and start to work.
author: Gordon B. Hinckley

quote: Our business in life is not to get ahead of others, but to get ahead of ourselves.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: Always bear in mind that our own resolution to succeed is more important than any other one thing.
author: Abraham Lincoln

quote: One must have strategies to execute dreams.
author: Azim Premji

quote: Try to forget yourself in the service of others. For when we think too much of ourselves and our own interests, we easily become despondent. But when we work for others, our efforts return to bless us.
author: Sidney Powell

quote: Opportunities multiply as they are seized.
author: Sun Tzu

quote: Nothing is so contagious as enthusiasm. It moves stones, it charms brutes. Enthusiasm is the genius of sincerity, and truth accomplishes no victories without it.
author: Edward Bulwer-Lytton

quote: Each problem that I solved became a rule which served afterwards to solve other problems.
author: Rene Descartes

quote: Success equals goals... all else is commentary.
author: Brian Tracy

quote: If you aren't making any mistakes, it's a sure sign you're playing it too safe.
author: John Maxwell

quote: I don't know the key to success, but the key to failure is trying to please everybody.
author: Bill Cosby

quote: The dictionary is the only place where success comes before work.
author: Arthur Brisbane

quote: Striving for success without hard work is like trying to harvest where you haven't planted.
author: David Bly

quote: As long as you are going to be thinking anyway, think big.
author: Donald Trump

quote: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
author: Robert Collier

quote: No man is ever whipped until he quits - in his own mind.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: Success is 20% skills and 80% strategy. You might know how to read, but more importantly, what's your plan to read?
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Be who you are and say what you feel, because those who mind don't matter and those who matter don't mind.
author: Dr. Suess

quote: People rarely succeed unless they have fun in what they are doing.
author: Dale Carnegie

quote: Enter every activity without giving mental recognition to the possibility of defeat. Concentrate on your strengths, instead of your weaknesses ... on your powers, instead of your problems.
author: Paul J. Meyer

quote: People with goals succeed because they know where they're going.
author: Earl Nightingale

quote: Thoughts and ideas are the source of all wealth, success, material gain, all great discoveries, inventions and achievement.
author: Mark Victor Hansen

quote: The secret of business is to know something that nobody else knows.
author: Aristotle Onansis

quote: In life, as in a football game, the principle to follow is: Hit the line hard.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: If you go to work on your goals, your goals will go to work on you. If you go to work on your plan, your plan will go to work on you. Whatever good things we build end up building us.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: If one advances confidently in the direction of his dreams, and endeavors to live the life which he has imagined, he will meet with a success unexpected in common hours.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: Successful leaders see the opportunities in every difficulty rather than the difficulty in every opportunity.
author: Reed Markham

quote: When you're going through hell, keep going.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Any idea that is held in the mind that is either feared or revered will, begin at once to clothe itself in the most convenient and appropriate physical forms available.
author: Andrew Carnegie

quote: If you can imagine it, you can create it. If you can dream it, you can become it.
author: William Arthur Ward

quote: Our doubts are traitors and make us lose the good that we oft may win by fearing to attempt.
author: William Shakespeare

quote: There is only one way to succeed in anything, and that is to give it everything.
author: Vince Lombardi

quote: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success. If you love what you are doing, you will be successful.
author: Albert Schweitzer

quote: Success... it's what you do with what you've got.
author: Leroy Van Dyke

quote: Behind every successful man there's a lot of unsuccessful years.
author: Bob Brown

quote: The pessimist sees difficulty in every opportunity. The optimist sees opportunity in every difficulty.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: Every evening, write down the six most important things that you must do the next day. Then while you sleep your subconscious will work on the best ways for you to accomplish them. Your next day will go much more smoothly.
author: Tom Hopkins

quote: Never turn down a job because you think it's too small, you don't know where it can lead.
author: Julia Morgan

quote: The test of a successful person is not an ability to eliminate all problems before they arise, but to meet and work out difficulties when they do arise. We must be willing to make an intelligent compromise with perfection lest we wait forever before taking action. It's still good advice to cross bridges as we come to them.
author: David Schwartz

quote: For it matters not how small the beginning may seem to be. What is once well done, is well done forever.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: People are always blaming circumstances for what they are. I don't believe in circumstances. The people who get on in this world are the people who get up and look for the circumstances they want and if they can't find them, make them.
author: George Bernard Shaw

quote: Develop success from failures. Discouragement and failure are two of the surest stepping stones to success.
author: Dale Carnegie

quote: If you think you can, you can. And if you think you can’t, you’re right.
author: Henry Ford

quote: He who has never failed somewhere, that man cannot be great.
author: Herman Melville

quote: Recipe for success: Study while others are sleeping; work while others are loafing; prepare while others are playing; and dream while others are wishing.
author: William A. Ward

quote: Success is not so much what we have, as it is what we are.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Hold a picture of yourself long and steadily enough in your mind's eye, and you will be drawn toward it. If you do not conquer self, you will be conquered by self. The ladder of success is never crowded at the top.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Well done is better than well said.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Success is going from failure to failure without loss of enthusiasm.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: The real secret to success is enthusiasm.
author: Walter Chrysler

quote: Those who have attained things worth having in this world have worked while others idled, have persevered while others gave up in despair, have practiced the valuable habits of self-denial, industry, and singleness of purpose.
author: Grenville Kleiser

quote: Be bold and mighty forces will come to your aid.
author: Basil King

quote: To be a champion, you have to believe in yourself when nobody else will.
author: Sugar Ray Robinson

quote: Most people give up just when they're about to achieve success. They quit on the one yard line. They give up at the last minute of the game, one foot from a winning touchdown.
author: Ross Perot

quote: People of mediocre ability sometimes achieve outstanding success because they don't know when to quit. Most men succeed because they are determined to.
author: George E. Allen

quote: If you envy successful people, you create a negative force field of attraction that repels you from ever doing the things that you need to do to be successful. If you admire successful people, you create a positive force field of attraction that draws you toward becoming more and more like the kinds of people that you want to be like.
author: Brian Tracy

quote: It is in your moments of decision that your destiny is shaped.
author: Anthony Robbins

quote: Consumers are statistics. Customers are people.
author: Stanley Marcus

quote: One half of life is luck, the other half is discipline and that's the important half. For without discipline you wouldn't know what to do with luck.
author: Carl Zuckmeyter

quote: Yesterday I dared to struggle. Today I dare to win.
author: Bernadette Devlin

quote: Look at a day when you are supremely satisfied at the end. It's not a day when you lounge around doing nothing. It's when you've had everything to do and you've done it.
author: Margaret Thatcher

quote: Even if you're on the right track, you'll get run over if you just sit there.
author: Will Rogers

quote: When I was young I observed that nine out of ten things I did were failures, so I did ten times more work.
author: Bernard Shaw

quote: Success is like a ladder and no one has ever climbed a ladder with their hands in their pockets.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: Nothing can stop the man with the right mental attitude from achieving his goal. Nothing on earth can help the man with the wrong mental attitude.
author: E. Joseph Cossman

quote: I can accept failure but I can't accept not trying.
author: Michael Jordan

quote: Often the difference between a successful man and a failure is not one's better abilities or ideas, but the courage that one has to bet on his ideas, to take a calculated risk and to act.
author: Maxwell Maltz

quote: Great things are not done by impulse, but by a series of small things brought together.
author: Vincent van Gogh

quote: Losers visualize the penalties of failure. Winners visualize the rewards of success.
author: Rob Gilbert

quote: Picture yourself vividly as winning and that alone will contribute immeasurably to success.
author: Harry Fosdick

quote: Peak performance in life isn't about succeeding all the time or even being happy all the time. It's often about compensating, adjusting, and doing the best you can with what you have right now.
author: Ken Ravizza

quote: Success is not the result of spontaneous combustion. You must set yourself on fire.
author: Reggie Leach

quote: It doesn't matter what you're trying to accomplish. It's all a matter of discipline. I was determined to discover what life held for me beyond the inner-city streets.
author: Wilma Rudolph

quote: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: A strong successful man is not the victim of his environment. He creates favorable conditions.
author: Orisen Marden

quote: Quality means doing it right when no one is looking.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Dreams are only foolish to those who lack them.
author: Peter Reese

quote: Someday I hope to enjoy enough of what the world calls success so that someone will ask me, 'What's the secret of it?' I shall say simply this: 'I get up when I fall down.'" +1
author: Paul Harvey

quote: Success of life depends upon keeping one's mind open to opportunity and seizing it when it comes.
author: Alice Foote MacDougall

quote: For true success ask yourself these four questions: Why? Why not? Why not me? Why not now?
author: Jimmy Dean

quote: Keep away from people who try to belittle your ambition. Small people always do that, but the really great make you feel that you, too, can become great.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Kites rise highest against the wind, not with it.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: Every great man, every successful man, no matter what the field of endeavor, has known the magic that lies in these words: Every adversity has the seed of an equivalent or greater benefit.
author: W. Clement Stone

quote: Success is 10 percent inspiration and 90 percent perspiration.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Our power is in our ability to decide.
author: Buckminster Fuller

quote: Life affords no higher pleasure than that of surmounting difficulties.
author: Samuel Johnson

quote: You do not pay the price of success, you enjoy the price of success.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: Make your life a mission - not an intermission.
author: Arnold Glasgow

quote: Do it trembling if you must, but do it!
author: Emmet Fox

quote: Consider the postage stamp. It secures success through its ability to stick to one thing until it gets there.
author: Josh Billings

quote: It takes twenty years to become an overnight success.
author: Eddie Cantor

quote: The basic rule of free enterprise: You must give in order to get.
author: Scott Alexander

quote: The more tranquil a man becomes, the greater is his success, his influence, his power for good. Calmness of mind is one of the beautiful jewels of wisdom.
author: James Allen

quote: The thing always happens that you really believe in and the belief in a thing makes it happen.
author: Frank Lloyd Wright

quote: The road to success is always under construction.
author: Lily Tomlin

quote: Hope is not a dream, but a way of making dreams become reality.
author: L.J. Cardina Suenens

quote: They can because they think they can.
author: Virgil

quote: We are made to persist. That's how we find out who we are.
author: Tobias Wolff

quote: Success has nothing to do with what you gain in life or accomplish for yourself. It's what you do for others.
author: Danny Thomas

quote: Men are born to succeed, not to fail.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: It's no use saying, 'We are doing our best.' You have got to succeed in doing what is necessary." +1
author: Winston Churchill

quote: Success is a process, a quality of mind and way of being, an outgoing affirmation of life.
author: Alex Noble

quote: Only those who will risk going too far can possibly find out how far they can go.
author: T.S. Eliot

quote: A man can succeed at almost anything for which he has unlimited enthusiasm.
author: Charles Schwab

quote: The five essential entrepreneurial skills for success: Concentration, Discrimination, Organization, Innovation and Communication.
author: Michael Gerber

quote: One sound idea is all that you need to achieve success.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: We can do anything we want to do if we stick to it long enough.
author: Helen Keller

quote: Success seems to be largely a matter of hanging on after others have let go.
author: William Feather

quote: Hard work is the price we must pay for success. I think you can accomplish anything if you're willing to pay the price.
author: Vince Lombardi

quote: Failure is only the opportunity to begin again more intelligently.
author: Henry Ford

quote: If you have no critics you'll likely have no success.
author: Malcolm Forbes

quote: In the middle of difficulty, lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: If you want to be successful, it's just this simple: Know what you are doing, love what you are doing, and believe in what you are doing.
author: Will Rogers

quote: Human beings can alter their lives by altering their attitudes of mind.
author: William James

quote: Give me a stock clerk with a goal and I'll give you a man who will make history. Give me a man with no goals and I'll give you a stock clerk.
author: J.C. Penney

quote: The successful man is one who had the chance and took it.
author: Roger Babson

quote: Make the most of yourself, for that is all there is for you.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: If you are never scared, embarrassed or hurt, it means you never take chances.
author: Julia Soul

quote: Man is a goal-seeking animal. His life only has meaning if he is reaching out and striving for his goals.
author: Aristotle

quote: The first step towards success in any occupation is to become interested in it.
author: Sir William Osler

quote: Every man is free to rise as far as he's able or willing, but the degree to which he thinks determines the degree to which he'll rise.
author: Ayn Rand

quote: The successful person places more attention on doing the right thing rather than doing things right.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: I have failed over and over again - that is why I succeed.
author: Michael Jordan

quote: The great end of life is not knowledge but action.
author: Thomas Henry Huxley

quote: The men who have done big things are those who were not afraid to attempt big things, who were not afraid to risk failure in order to gain success.
author: B.C. Forbes

quote: Do not let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.
author: John Wooden

quote: Success is living up to your potential. That's all. Wake up with a smile and go after life ... live it, enjoy it, taste it, smell it, feel it.
author: Joe Knapp

quote: Only those who dare to fail greatly can ever achieve greatly.
author: Robert F. Kennedy

quote: A leader has the vision and conviction that a dream can be achieved. He inspired the power and energy to get it done.
author: Ralph Lauren

quote: What the mind can conceive and believe, the mind can achieve.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: The way to succeed is to double your failure rate. Failure is the opportunity to begin again more intelligently.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Sooner or later those who win are those who think they can.
author: Richard Bach

quote: People become really quite remarkable when they start thinking that they can do things. When they believe in themselves they have the first secret of success.
author: Norman Vincent Peale

quote: Spectacular achievements are always preceded by painstaking preparation.
author: Roger Staubach

quote: If we did all the things we are capable of doing, we would literally astonish ourselves.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
author: Lao-Tse

quote: Success is the maximum utilization of the ability that you have.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: The difficulties and struggles of today are but the price we must pay for the accomplishments and victories of tomorrow.
author: William Boetcker

quote: Do what you can with what you have where you are.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: Failure is the tuition you pay for success.
author: Walter Brunell

quote: Real wealth equals ideas plus energy.
author: Buckminster Fuller

quote: We grow great by dreams. All big men are dreamers.
author: Woodrow Wilson

quote: We are continually faced by great opportunities brilliantly disguised as insoluble problems.
author: Lee Iococca

quote: Private victories precede public victories.
author: Stephen R. Covey

quote: Great minds have purpose, others have wishes.
author: Washington Irving

quote: The common denominator of success is in forming the habit of doing the things that failures don't like to do.
author: Albert Gray

quote: Singleness of purpose is one of the chief essentials for success in life, no matter what may be one's aim.
author: John D. Rockefeller

quote: I will say this about being an optimist: even when things don't turn out well, you are certain they will get better.
author: Frank Hughes

quote: Some men see things as they are, and say, 'Why?' I dream of things that never were, and say, 'Why not?'" +1
author: George Bernard Shaw

quote: Perseverance is a great element of success.
author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quote: A person's way of doing things is the direct result of the way he thinks about things.
author: Wallace D. Wattles

quote: Success demands singleness of purpose.
author: Vince Lombardi

quote: A man is but of product of his thought, What he thinks he becomes.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: The secret of success is learning how to use pain and pleasure instead of having pain and pleasure use you. If you do that, you're in control of your life. If you don't, life controls you.
author: Anthony Robbins

quote: First, say to yourself what you would be, then do what you have to do.
author: Epictetus

quote: If you can dream it, you can do it. Your limits are all within yourself.
author: Brian Tracy

quote: A problem is a chance for you to do your best.
author: Duke Ellington

quote: Nature gave men two ends... one to sit on and one to think with. Ever since then man's success or failure has been dependent on the one he used most.
author: George R. Kilpatrick

quote: The will to do springs from the knowledge that we can do.
author: James Allen

quote: It is observed that successful people get ahead in the time that other people waste.
author: Henry Ford

quote: You see things and say, 'Why?' But I dream of things that never were and say 'Why not?'
author: George Bernard Shaw

quote: Many of life's failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success when they gave up.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: You must have long range goals to keep from being frustrated by short-term failures.
author: Bob Bales

quote: I would rather attempt something great and fail than attempt to do nothing and succeed.
author: Robert Schuller

quote: What you can do, or dream you can, begin it. Boldness has genius, power, and magic in it.
author: Goethe

quote: Our lives improve only when we take chances, and the first and most difficult risk we can take is to be honest with ourselves.
author: Walter Anderson

quote: Either do not attempt at all, or go through with it.
author: Ovid

quote: I don't dream at night, I dream all day. I dream for a living.
author: Steven Spielberg

quote: Hope is the companion of power and the mother of success. For those of us who hope strongest have within us the gift of miracles.
author: Sydney Bremer

quote: The gem cannot be polished without friction, nor man perfected without trials.
author: Confucius

quote: If you don't know where you are going, every road will get you nowhere.
author: Henry Kissinger

quote: Man is what he believes.
author: Anton Chekhov

quote: Goals are dreams we convert to plans and take action to fulfill.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: Four steps to achievement: plan purposefully, prepare prayerfully, proceed positively, pursue persistently.
author: William A. Ward

quote: I never waste time looking back.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Who told you it couldn't be done? And what great achievement has he to his credit that entitles him to use the word 'impossible' so freely?
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: Dream no small dreams for they have no power to move the hearts of men.
author: Goethe

quote: I am a slow walker ... but I never walk backwards.
author: Abraham Lincoln

quote: An aim in life is the only fortune worth finding, and it is not to be found in foreign lands, but in the heart itself.
author: Robert Louis Stevenson

quote: Wherever you see a successful business, someone once made a courageous decision.
author: Peter F. Drucker

quote: The road to success runs uphill.
author: Willie Davis

quote: Success requires first expending ten units of effort to produce one unit of results. Your momentum will then produce ten units of results with each unit of effort.
author: Charles Givens

quote: The only honest measure of your success is what you are doing compared to your true potential.
author: Paul J. Meyer

quote: Any fact facing us is not as important as our attitude toward it, for that determines our success or failure.
author: Norman Vincent Peale

quote: It is easy to sit up and take notice. What is difficult is getting up and taking action.
author: Al Batt

quote: Success is getting what you want. Happiness is wanting what you get.
author: Dale Carnegie

quote: To be successful, the first thing to do is fall in love with your work.
author: Sister Mary Lauretta

quote: Never, never, never, never give up.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: Ones best success comes after their greatest disappointments.
author: Henry Ward Beecher

quote: Nothing in the world can take the place of persistence. Talent will not; nothing is more common than unsuccessful men with talent. Genius will not; the world is full of educated derelicts. Persistence and determination alone are omnipotent. The phrase 'press on' has solved and always will solve the problems of the human race.
author: Calvin Coolidge
